name: M-88 Tactical Recon Drone
description: Stealth-coated micro-UAV with thermal imaging and 24-hour loiter time. Encrypted long-range link included.

name: Titan-V Exoskeleton Suit
description: Hydraulic-assisted power armor increasing lift capacity by 500%. Features integrated ballistic plating and HUD.

name: Night-Stalker Gen-4 NVGs
description: Quad-tube panoramic night vision with white phosphor technology. Depth perception optimized for close-quarters battle.

name: Aegis Portable Jammer
description: Wide-spectrum electronic warfare device. Disrupts all R/C and cellular signals in a 200m radius.

name: Sentinel Ballistic Shield
description: Level IV multi-hit capable foldable shield. Integrated 2500 lumen blinding strobe light.

name: Vanguard Comms Array
description: Satellite-linked hardened radio system. Frequency hopping technology ensures jam-proof communication.

name: Specter Recon Drone
description: Lightweight surveillance drone equipped with night vision and real-time video transmission.

name: Titan Tactical Tablet
description: Rugged military-grade tablet designed for field operations with enhanced durability and GPS tracking.

name: Falcon Communication Hub
description: Portable communications terminal providing secure voice and data connectivity in remote environments.
